$description: Component tokens for Textarea fields with default and destructive (error) states across 6 sizes. Figma Reference: Textarea Component

$component.name: Textarea
$component.description: A multi-line text input component for longer form content. Supports character counting, validation states, and resizable text areas.
$component.structure: Container with border, multi-line text field, optional character counter with validation states and focus indicators

sizes.3xs: Minimal size for very compact layouts
sizes.sm: Standard small size for most forms

variants.default: Standard textarea with neutral colors for normal data entry
variants.destructive: Error state with red/error colors for validation feedback

usage.contexts: Forms, comment sections, message inputs, feedback forms, note-taking interfaces, content creation
usage.features: Character counter, multi-line input, resizable height, validation states, focus indicators

xs.description: Textarea border radius for xs size

sm.description: Textarea border radius for sm size

md.description: Textarea border radius for md size

lg.description: Textarea border radius for lg size

padding.$comment: Internal spacing for textarea content - horizontal (x) and vertical (y) padding

xs.description: Textarea horizontal padding for xs size

sm.description: Textarea horizontal padding for sm size

md.description: Textarea horizontal padding for md size

lg.description: Textarea horizontal padding for lg size

xs.description: Textarea vertical padding for xs size

sm.description: Textarea vertical padding for sm size

md.description: Textarea vertical padding for md size

lg.description: Textarea vertical padding for lg size

height.$comment: Minimum textarea heights for each size variant

gap.$comment: Spacing between textarea elements (character counter and other internal elements)

shadow.$comment: Subtle elevation shadow for textarea fields

text.$comment: Typography tokens for textarea text content across all sizes

xs.description: Textarea text typography for xs size

sm.description: Textarea text typography for sm size

md.description: Textarea text typography for md size

lg.description: Textarea text typography for lg size

color.$comment: Color tokens for textarea states - includes default (neutral) and destructive (error/validation) variants with interaction states

default.$comment: Default textarea colors with neutral palette for standard data entry

default.description: Default textarea background in default state

hover.description: Default textarea background in hover state

hover.description: Default textarea text color in hover state

filled.description: Default textarea text color in filled state

focused.description: Default textarea text color in focused state

hover-filled.description: Default textarea text color in hover-filled state
